privileged_info_summary: Epi Info 7 Visual Dashboard is official CDC epidemiological software that supports CSV data import and Pareto chart analysis. The task requires filtering bloodstream infection data (Source='Blood') and analyzing pathogens (Organism field) using Pareto charts to identify the 'vital few' pathogens—a legitimate epidemiological application of the Pareto principle (80/20 rule). The hospital_microbiology.csv dataset is synthetically created (not a public standard dataset), similar to other surveillance datasets in this environment (salmonella_foodnet_surveillance_analysis uses CDC FoodNet data synthesized into MDB format). Canvas files (.cvs7) are saved as XML. All required metadata elements correspond to real Epi Info 7 features and epidemiological data concepts verified through official CDC documentation.
